interaction_phrase: collaboration with the quantum computer manufacturer planqc
occurrence_sentence: The German Aerospace Center (DLR) has announced a significant collaboration with the quantum computer manufacturer planqc and the consulting firm d-fine to strategically advance its capabilities in quantum computing.
